allow: PowerShell($env:JPMCP_WANIKANI_TOKEN = "dummy-token-for-smoke-test"; $env:JPMCP_DATA_DIR = "$PWD\\.smoke"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "uv" -ArgumentList "run","python","-m","japanese_practice_mcp" -PassThru -RedirectStandardError ".smoke-err.log" -RedirectStandardOutput ".smoke-out.log" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Host "RUNNING \(good\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force } else { Write-Host "EXITED with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content .smoke-err.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-Content .smoke-err.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($env:JPMCP_WANIKANI_TOKEN = "dummy"; $env:JPMCP_DATA_DIR = "$PWD\\.smoke"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "uv" -ArgumentList "run","python","-m","japanese_practice_mcp" -PassThru -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardError ".smoke-err.log" -RedirectStandardOutput ".smoke-out.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Host "RUNNING"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force } else { Get-Content .smoke-err.log })
